subject: ri_policy_router
summary: The late-December continuation issue is split across two distinct seam classes, so the next candidate must choose one target instead of bundling both together.
mechanism: 2023-12-22 15:00 is weak pre-aged continuation while 2023-12-24 21:00 is already strong continuation, making a single weak-continuation-only candidate structurally misleading.
do_not_repeat: Do not bundle seam A and seam B into one weak-continuation-only candidate.
Do not touch already-strong continuation semantics without a newly scoped packet.
next_admissible_step: Author the next candidate against one explicitly declared seam class and reopen governance review if it needs to affect already-strong continuation semantics.
